titleEn: Rauch shows latest top-of-the-range fertiliser spreader at DLG Feldtage
titleZh: 劳赫在DLG田间日展示最新顶级肥料撒播机Axis 55
summaryZh: 劳赫在DLG田间日推出新型Axis 55肥料撒播机，取代Axis 50.2系列，配备3500升料斗，最大流量提升30%至675公斤/分钟，工作宽度12-56米，仅需3套撒播盘。支持高速作业（25公里/小时下36米幅宽可施900公斤/公顷），并配备新型GSE-X边界撒播板和Axmat-X雷达监测系统。该设备虽主要面向大田作物，但其精准撒播和自动化监测技术对智慧种植业有参考价值。
translationZh:
DLG田间日上并没有太多机器首发，但肥料撒播机制造商劳赫确实利用该活动展示了一款新机器。

而Axis 55，在制造商去年推出新款Axis 25之后，立即成为顶级型号。Axis 55接替现有的Axis 50.2系列，因此也将提供机械式PTO驱动版本和液压驱动版本。与其“小兄弟”Axis 25的相似之处在于最大流量提升至675公斤/分钟，比之前增加了30%。劳赫进一步开发了撒播盘和叶片，以覆盖更宽的工作宽度范围。其意图是使用3套撒播盘即可实现12至56米宽的撒播，尽管不能排除对于轻质肥料在大工作宽度下可能需要第4套撒播盘。

**高达900公斤/公顷**

这款新的劳赫顶级型号顺应了提高产能的发展趋势，料斗容积尤其是流量增加，以便在相对较高的前进速度下进行撒播。得益于增加的流量，在36米工作宽度、25公里/小时行驶速度下，应能施用900公斤/公顷。在另一个极端，低施用量（例如杀蛞蝓颗粒剂）无需改装或附件即可施用。

**3套撒播盘，可达56米**

根据肥料类型，撒播机的最小工作宽度为12米，最大为56米。为此“仅”需要3套不同的撒播盘。此前覆盖这些工作宽度需要6套撒播盘。撒播盘和叶片的形状已针对更多工作宽度进行了进一步开发，此前为18-50米，并且叶片仍采用涂层处理以延长使用寿命。边界撒播板也是新的，现称为GSE-X。使用它，在畦作栽培中还可以防止肥料落入轮辙中。

可选的Axmat系统（带雷达传感器用于监测撒播模式）和GSE边界撒播板也已更新，现分别称为Axmat-X和GSE-X。使用后者，在畦作栽培中还可以防止肥料落入轮辙中。

Axis 55的最大有效载荷为5500公斤，制造商强调，在选择最大料斗容积时，可以装载多达6500升容重较低的肥料。熟悉的EMC系统自动监测流量，从而监测施用量。为了了解当前料斗内容物，劳赫像以前一样提供称重框架。

进口商Reesink Agri将
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了肥料撒播机在精准农业方面的最新进展，尤其是流量提升、自动化监测和边界控制技术，对智慧种植业（大田作物）的精准施肥实践具有参考价值。
contentFull: Rauch shows latest top-of-the-range fertiliser spreader at DLG Feldtage 23-06 | Crop solutions | NewsAfter the Axis 25 introduced last year, spreader manufacturer Rauch is now launching the new Axis 55. The model replaces the current 50.2 models and mainly offers more capacity than its predecessor. This model has a 3,500-litre hopper. Photos: René KoerhuisThe DLG Feldtage did not feature many machine premieres, but fertiliser spreader manufacturer Rauch did use the event to show a new machine.And with the Axis 55, that is immediately the top model after the manufacturer launched the new Axis 25 last year. The Axis 55 succeeds the existing Axis 50.2 models and will therefore also be available in a mechanically PTO-driven version and a hydraulically driven version. The similarity with its ‘little brother’, the Axis 25, is the increased maximum flow rate of 675 kg/min. That is 30% more than before. Rauch further developed the discs and vanes for a wider range of working widths. The intention is that 3 disc sets will allow spreading from 12 to 56 metres wide, although it cannot be ruled out that a 4th set will be needed for light fertiliser types at large working widths.Up to 900 kg/haThe new Rauch top model fits in with developments and the drive for more capacity, with hopper volume and especially flow rate increasing in order to spread at relatively high forward speeds. Thanks to the increased flow rate, it should be possible to apply 900 kg/ha at a working width of 36 metres while driving at 25 km/h. At the other end of the spectrum, low application rates, such as slug pellets for example, can be applied without modifications and/or accessories.3 disc sets, up to 56 metresDepending on the fertiliser type, the spreader can spread at a minimum width of 12 metres and a maximum width of 56 metres. For this, ‘only’ 3 different disc sets are required. Until now, 6 disc sets were needed to cover those working widths. The shape of the discs and vanes has been further developed with a view to more working widths, previously 18-50 metres, and as before the vanes are coated for a longer service life. The border spreading plate is also new and is now called GSE-X. With this, in bed cultivation you can also prevent fertiliser from ending up in the wheel track.The optional Axmat system with radar sensors for monitoring the spreading pattern and the GSE border spreading plate have also been renewed and are now called Axmat-X and GSE-X respectively. With the latter, in bed cultivation you can also prevent fertiliser from ending up in the wheel track.The Axis 55 has a maximum payload of 5,500 kilograms and the manufacturer stresses that you can carry up to 6,500 litres of fertiliser with a relatively low bulk density when choosing the largest hopper volume. The familiar EMC system automatically monitors the flow and therefore the application rate. For insight into the current hopper contents, Rauch supplies a weighing frame as before.Importer Reesink Agri will announce the prices of the new Rauch Axis 55 later this summer.Join 17,000+ subscribersSubscribe to our newsletter to stay updated about all the need-to-know content in the agricultural sector, two times a week. contentHtml: The DLG Feldtage did not feature many machine premieres, but fertiliser spreader manufacturer Rauch did use the event to show a new machine.
